step_rationale: Lactylation marker; glycogenolysis in metabolic stress, not plaque-cascade step.
mechanism: Glycogenolysis enzyme linked to lactate generation and lactylation signaling in acute myocardial stress.

references.title: Early diagnostic biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction unveiled by metabolomics, Mendelian randomization, and machine learning.
Identification of a lactylation-related gene signature as the novel biomarkers for early diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
